query: SELECT id, streamerName, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(livestreamDate) as unix_start, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(livestreamEndTime) as unix_end, CONVERT_TZ(livestreamDate, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_start, CONVERT_TZ(livestreamEndTime, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_end FROM brand_livestreams WHERE (streamerName LIKE '%NANA%' OR streamerName LIKE '%nana%') AND livestreamDate >= '2025-02-08' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, streamerName, livestreamDate, livestreamEndTime, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(livestreamDate) as unix_start, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(livestreamEndTime) as unix_end, CONVERT_TZ(livestreamDate, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_start, CONVERT_TZ(livestreamEndTime, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_end FROM brand_livestreams WHERE (streamerName LIKE '%NANA%' OR streamerName LIKE '%nana%') AND livestreamDate >= '2025-02-08' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 5;
